zh.Haverfordwest, Pembrokeshire, Wales: 威爾士布洛可爾哈維福德維斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Perrot於1500年出生在威爾士布洛可爾時，他的父親Sir Owen Perrot28歲，母親Katherine Poyntz33歲。他於1526年與Lady Mary Anne Berkeley結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1529年在英國英格蘭享年29歲。

zh-hans.Haverfordwest, Pembrokeshire, Wales: 威尔士布洛可爾哈維福德維斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Perrot于1500年出生在威尔士布洛可爾时，他的父亲Sir Owen Perrot28岁，母亲Katherine Poyntz33岁。他于1526年与Lady Mary Anne Berkeley结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1529年在英国英格兰享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: Perrot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Gilles, Veronique.
French: from a pet form of the Old French personal name Perre, a variant of Pierre , French form of Peter . Compare Perrotte .
Breton: from a French-influenced pet form (see 1 above) of the personal name Per, Breton form of Peter . Compare Perro .

variants.name: Pierre
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Jacques, Antoine, Yves, Michel, Jean Claude, Mireille, Jean Robert, Francois, Monique, Raoul, Serge.
French, Walloon, West Indian (mainly Haiti), and Mauritian:

from the personal name Pierre, French form of Peter (see also below). This is one of the most frequent surnames in Haiti (along with Jean and Joseph ) and in Saint Martin. It is also established elsewhere in the West Indies (e.g. in Trinidad and Tobago, Saint Lucia, Grenada, and Bahamas).

variants.name: Perrotte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Damien, Henri.
Altered form of French Perrot or Perrault , reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.
French: from the feminine form of   Perrot  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Perrot was born in 1500, in Pembrokeshire, Wales, his father, Sir Owen Perrot, was 28 and his mother, Katherine Poyntz, was 33. He married Lady Mary Anne Berkeley in 1526. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1529, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Perrot est né en 1500, à Pembrokeshire, Galles, son père, Sir Owen Perrot, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Katherine Poyntz, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Lady Mary Anne Berkeley en 1526. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1529, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Perrot 1500 in Pembrokeshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Owen Perrot 28 und seine Mutter Katherine Poyntz 33. Er hat 1526 Lady Mary Anne Berkeley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1529 im Alter von 29 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Perrot è nato il nel 1500 nel Pembrokeshire, Galles, il suo padre, Sir Owen Perrot, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Poyntz, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Lady Mary Anne Berkeley nel 1526. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1529, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Perrotが1500年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Owen Perrotは28歳，母Katherine Poyntzは33歳であった。1526年にLady Mary Anne Berkeleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1529年にイギリスイギリスで29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Perrot(이)가 1500년 웨일스 p브로케실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Owen Perrot(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Poyntz(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1526년 Lady Mary Anne Berkeley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1529년 영국 잉글랜드에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.Heroldstone, Pembroke, Wales: Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Perrot nasceu em 1500, em Pembrokeshire, Gales, seu pai, Sir Owen Perrot, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Poyntz, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Mary Anne Berkeley em 1526. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1529, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 29 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Perrot родился в 1500 г. в местности пемброкешир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Sir Owen Perrot было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Poyntz, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Mary Anne Berkeley в 1526 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1529 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 29 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Perrot nació en 1500, en Pembrokeshire, Gales, su papá, Sir Owen Perrot, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Katherine Poyntz, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Lady Mary Anne Berkeley en 1526. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1529, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 29 años.
